MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-27-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 8, 2014, TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 27, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-27-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-27-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'s Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Writ Of Attachment is continued to January 8, 2014, to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 27, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/mjm
